title: Bluey Save with Bluey Bank – Coin Savings Box for Kids, Fun Money Toy Gift
features: Shaped just like Bluey from the show!
Insert coins to hear different sound effects & character sounds
Press Bluey’s nose to hear the theme tune
description: Product description SAVE WITH BLUEY TOY - Save with Bluey is not just a toy; it's an adventure waiting to happen. With this delightful companion, your little one will dive into a world of fun and discovery while mastering the art of saving pennies for a rainy day. But wait, there's more! Bluey isn't your ordinary toy; it's a financial mentor in disguise. Your child will learn essential life skills like budgeting, setting goals, and understanding the value of money—all while having a blast!FEATURES - The coolest way to turn money lessons into an epic adventure for your little one. Watch as Bluey transforms saving into a fun game, teaching valuable life skills with a sprinkle of joy. Including 10 numbered coins, with each coin insert hear different sound effect and sounds form your favourite characters form the show. Even better, press Bluey's nose to hear the Bluey Theme Tune. The ultimate playmate for turning money lessons into pure fun. PRETEND PLAY - Pretend-play is an essential part of early learning and the more your child engages in imaginative play, the more they expand their imagination and creativity. Role-play also allows your child to see things in different perspectives and let them experience a wide range of emotions. A fun and exciting activity that stretches the imagination and enriches creativity, children can come up with their own recipes, make up menus, explore different ingredients and experiment.PRODUCT SPECIFICATION - Includes 1x Interactive Bluey Figure & 10x Play Money Coins. Perfect for encouraging social play and educational development. Requires 2x AA Batteries. Product Dimensions: H17cm x W10cm x D11.6cm. Suitable for all children aged 2+.BLUEY LICENSED PRODUCTS - Take a look at our extensive range of Bluey role play toys ranging from Bluey dolls prams, strollers, highchairs and nursery sets. We also have a great selection of Bluey kitchens, tea sets, shopping and musical instruments. Perfect for encouraging your children to grow and learn whilst having fun. Our Bluey Toys are the perfect gift for any child who is the fan of the show. Directions Insert 2x AA batteries. Insert coins to hear different sound effects and character sounds. Press Bluey's nose to hear the Bluey Theme Tune.
